channel.title: Software Engineering on Jiancong Zhu
channel.description: Recent content in Software Engineering on Jiancong Zhu

item.title: Software Engineering
item.description:
Overview

Software is more than just a program code. It is considered to be collection of executable programming code, associated libraries and documentations.

Engineering on the other hand, is all about developing products, using well-defined, scientific principles and methods.

IEEE Definition

(1) The application of a systematic, disciplined, quantifiable approach to the development, operation, and maintenance of software; that is, the application of engineering to software.

(2) The study of approaches as in the above statement.
